item.title: 1.7.0 (ARM64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.7.0

    New Design

    • Refreshed app design across the whole app, matching the Mac experience
    • Redesigned Model Library with star ratings and sortable columns
    • New home screen with a built-in stats bar

    New Features

    • Real-time streaming transcription as you speak
    • On-device AI for offline post-processing (no cloud needed)
    • Local API server so other apps can transcribe through HyperWhisper
    • New offline models: Qwen3-ASR and Nemotron, plus ARM64 support
    • New cloud providers: Microsoft, Google Chirp 3, Grok, and Gemini 3.5 Flash
    • Section-by-section backup and restore
    • Automatic filler-word removal (um, uh) even without post-processing

    Improvements & Fixes

    • Better GPU detection across more hardware
    • More reliable recovery if a recording is interrupted
    • Smarter clipboard handling and faster cloud connections
    • Bug fixes and stability improvements

item.title: 1.7.0 (x64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.7.0

    New Design

    • Refreshed app design across the whole app, matching the Mac experience
    • Redesigned Model Library with star ratings and sortable columns
    • New home screen with a built-in stats bar

    New Features

    • Real-time streaming transcription as you speak
    • On-device AI for offline post-processing (no cloud needed)
    • Local API server so other apps can transcribe through HyperWhisper
    • New offline models: Qwen3-ASR and Nemotron, plus ARM64 support
    • New cloud providers: Microsoft, Google Chirp 3, Grok, and Gemini 3.5 Flash
    • Section-by-section backup and restore
    • Automatic filler-word removal (um, uh) even without post-processing

    Improvements & Fixes

    • Better GPU detection across more hardware
    • More reliable recovery if a recording is interrupted
    • Smarter clipboard handling and faster cloud connections
    • Bug fixes and stability improvements

item.title: 1.6.0 (ARM64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.6.0

  • Added support for additional post-processing AI models
  • Two-tier cloud post-processing accuracy selection
  • Bug fixes and stability improvements

item.title: 1.6.0 (x64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.6.0

  • Added support for additional post-processing AI models
  • Two-tier cloud post-processing accuracy selection
  • Bug fixes and stability improvements

item.title: 1.5.0 (ARM64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.0

  • Improved push-to-talk reliability with better state management and keyboard compatibility
  • Fixed recording being triggered by Esc key and focus stealing issues
  • Support for custom endpoints in post-processing
  • Auto-launch on startup and automatic restart after silent updates
  • Cross-platform backup format for easier settings transfer

item.title: 1.5.0 (x64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.0

  • Improved push-to-talk reliability with better state management and keyboard compatibility
  • Fixed recording being triggered by Esc key and focus stealing issues
  • Support for custom endpoints in post-processing
  • Auto-launch on startup and automatic restart after silent updates
  • Cross-platform backup format for easier settings transfer

item.title: 1.4.0 (ARM64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.4.0

  • Add Gemini AI transcription on Windows
  • Add NVIDIA Parakeet local transcription engine
  • Push-to-Talk keyboard shortcuts
  • Cloud provider enhancements: Fireworks & Mistral file size support, improved retry handling
  • Better punctuation formatting and model accuracy
  • Bug fixes and performance improvements

item.title: 1.4.0 (x64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.4.0

  • Add Gemini AI transcription on Windows
  • Add NVIDIA Parakeet local transcription engine
  • Push-to-Talk keyboard shortcuts
  • Cloud provider enhancements: Fireworks & Mistral file size support, improved retry handling
  • Better punctuation formatting and model accuracy
  • Bug fixes and performance improvements

item.title: 1.3.2 (ARM64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.3.2

  • Faster local transcription with Flash Attention and pipeline optimizations
  • Fixed GPU not being used on multi-GPU systems
  • Model now preloads when switching modes
  • Bug fixes and stability improvements

item.title: 1.3.2 (x64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.3.2

  • Faster local transcription with Flash Attention and pipeline optimizations
  • Fixed GPU not being used on multi-GPU systems
  • Model now preloads when switching modes
  • Bug fixes and stability improvements

item.title: 1.3.1 (ARM64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.3.1

  • Single-instance protection
  • Default Change Mode shortcut → Ctrl+Shift+.
  • Fixed OemPeriod display in shortcuts
  • Shortcut conflict banner replaces toast

item.title: 1.3.1 (x64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.3.1

  • Single-instance protection
  • Default Change Mode shortcut → Ctrl+Shift+.
  • Fixed OemPeriod display in shortcuts
  • Shortcut conflict banner replaces toast

item.title: 1.3.0 (ARM64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.3.0

  • Auto email formatting — detects email apps and formats greetings, sign-offs, and paragraphs automatically
  • Switch modes anytime with Ctrl+Shift+M, even while not recording
  • AI post-processing enabled by default for new installs
  • Improved post-processing accuracy with pre-captured application context
  • Redesigned mode editor with card layout matching macOS design
  • New Code preset for programming dictation
  • Shows Exceeds VRAM label instead of misleading Use Cloud for large models
  • History empty state now shows your actual hotkey

item.title: 1.3.0 (x64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.3.0

  • Auto email formatting — detects email apps and formats greetings, sign-offs, and paragraphs automatically
  • Switch modes anytime with Ctrl+Shift+M, even while not recording
  • AI post-processing enabled by default for new installs
  • Improved post-processing accuracy with pre-captured application context
  • Redesigned mode editor with card layout matching macOS design
  • New Code preset for programming dictation
  • Shows Exceeds VRAM label instead of misleading Use Cloud for large models
  • History empty state now shows your actual hotkey

item.title: 1.2.5 (ARM64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.2.5

  • Fixed app opening minimized instead of visible on launch

item.title: 1.2.5 (x64)
item.description:
What's New in 1.2.5

  • Fixed app opening minimized instead of visible on launch
